name: Patient 31
history: Recent family deaths. Ongoing concern about parents' health. Father has multiple health conditions. Tension with father about emotional distance and health transparency.
intermediate_belief: I can't protect my parents from their health declines.
intermediate_belief_depression: My family is falling apart and I can't stop it.
coping_strategies: Monitoring parents' health, emotional withdrawal after stress.
situation: Received phone call from mother regarding father's health. Watched television afterward.
auto_thought: My father's health is deteriorating and there's nothing I can do.
behavior: Receive health update about father, then distract with television.
